Welcome

Welcome to scrollify's Help Center, your one-stop destination for Capturing Customer Attention and Enhancing Browsing Experience

NextSet Up Infinite Scroll with Auto Load

Last updated 1 year ago

What is Scrollify?

Scrollfy makes browsing easier. It loads content automatically as you scroll down on collection pages, search pages, and more. You can also add a "Load More" button for extra products. This endless scroll captures attention, improves the user experience, and reduces the need for multiple clicks. Users can scroll through products limitlessly. Customize your scroll button to match your style and enjoy fast, uninterrupted product loading. It's that simple!

This is our app; there are a lot of other copies out there. They claim to be us and use our materials to promote their app

OVERVIEW OF THE APP :

Quick links

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) - Infinite Scroll App

I encountered an issue with the app. Is customer support available to assist me?

Yes, our customers have found our support team to be incredibly helpful and responsive. They've reported that issues were fixed quickly, often within minutes.

How does the app improve the browsing experience?

The app implements infinite scroll, which allows you to seamlessly scroll through products without the need to click "next page." This feature works on various pages, including search results and collection pages, making the browsing experience smoother.

Does the app provide a value for its price?

Users have described the app as both useful and affordable, indicating it delivers on what it promises. The consensus is that it's an excellent investment for 2.99$

Is there any issue with server speed that users should be aware of?

While the app has been praised for its usefulness, some users have suggested that enhancing server speed would be beneficial. However, this issue doesn't seem to have been a significant concern for most users.

Can the app be customized to meet specific design preferences?

Yes, users have mentioned that the app allows for customization of the scroll button in various styles to align with your website's design.

Is the app suitable for non-English-speaking users?

Yes, some users have given positive feedback in other languages, suggesting that the support team is prompt and accurate in addressing issues, even in languages other than English.

I'm new to the app. How do I get started?

To get started, simply click the "Get Started" button. If you encounter any difficulties, feel free to contact our support team for assistance.

Are there any reported glitches, and how quickly are they resolved?

Some users have mentioned experiencing glitches, but they were quick to praise our support team for resolving these issues promptly. Your satisfaction is our priority.

Is the app suitable for online stores with a large number of products?

Yes, the app is ideal for online stores with a wide range of products. It enables your customers to view all your products without the inconvenience of having to click through multiple pages.

Why should I choose this app for infinite scroll?

Users have highlighted the app's smooth, hassle-free performance and exceptional customer support as reasons to choose it. They've highly recommended it for a superior browsing experience.
